summary: Comprehensive testing of PropValu v2.1 - New features: land_use field, improved valuation methodology, report sections (USO DE SUELO, EQUIPAMIENTO, thermometer, 8 tips). All features working correctly. Fixed bug in report_generator.py for None latitude/longitude.

fixed.issue: TypeError when latitude/longitude is None - using .get() default didn't work because key exists with None value
fixed.fix: Changed from prop.get('latitude', 19.4326) to prop.get('latitude') or 19.4326

passed_tests: Property types endpoint - returns all 7 types
Create valuation with land_use field - H1, H2, H3, HC accepted
Create valuation without land_use - field is optional
Generate comparables - returns 6+ comparables with rental data
Calculate valuation - improved 80/20 methodology producing realistic values
Generate report contains USO DE SUELO section with land use code
Generate report contains EQUIPAMIENTO Y SERVICIOS CERCANOS with 6 numbered amenities
Generate report contains 8 numbered selling tips
Error handling - 400 for report without calculation
Frontend: Land use selector visible on Step 2 with all options (H1-H4, HC, CU, CB, CS, I, EA)
Frontend: Report page shows all new sections
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test valuations with land_use field
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (land_use, improved methodology, report sections) are working. The web scraping for comparables falls back to simulated data when real scraping fails - this is expected MOCKED behavior. Sample valuation val_6250e8a5af3d has complete data including report.

land_use_field.frontend: Selector present on Step 2 with 11 options
land_use_field.report: USO DE SUELO section shows code and description

improved_methodology.values: Realistic for CDMX - $31,149/m² for Del Valle Centro

report_sections.uso_de_suelo: Shows H2 - Habitacional Plurifamiliar Baja with description
report_sections.equipamiento: 6 numbered amenities with icons (escuelas, hospitales, clínicas, supermercados, mercados, vías)
report_sections.thermometer: Visual indicator of value position in range
report_sections.selling_tips: 8 numbered tips (Pintura, Limpieza, Fotos, Home Staging, Reparaciones, Precio, Documentación, Asesor)

mocked_apis.web_scraping: Comparables from inmuebles24, lamudi, etc. fall back to simulated data when scraping fails
